upcoming.title: Scheduled pull request
upcoming.note: Roll-off RO-30-08 is queued for pickup. Site contact will receive a call 30 minutes before arrival.

upcoming.title: Rental extension review
upcoming.note: Office review required if container remains on site beyond weekend without swap request.

notices.title: Route timing may shift around holidays
notices.body: If a holiday falls mid-week, updated pull and service windows will be posted on the route updates page and sent by email.

notices.title: Do not load above the top rail
notices.body: Overfilled containers may need to be offloaded before pickup for transport safety.

notices.title: Placement requests help avoid delays
notices.body: Use the service note area to leave gate, pad, and placement instructions before a drop or swap.
